info.title: Longdo Map API
info.description: Longdo Map provides online mapping services for Thailand and the world, including search, suggest, geocoding, reverse geocoding, address extraction, routing, traffic, TSP (route planning), and POI services. All endpoints require an API key passed as a query parameter.

get.description: Returns search suggestions for the given keyword.
Searches for places matching the given keyword.
Enhanced search with smart matching and extended search capabilities.
Parses and extracts structured address components from free-form text.

parameters.name: censor
parameters.description: Remove phone numbers and emails (0 or 1).

get.description: Converts an address text into geographic coordinates.
Converts coordinates or a Longdo Map ID to a readable address with administrative divisions.
Reverse geocodes multiple coordinates at once (max 100).

parameters.name: wkt
parameters.description: Well-known text as alternative to lon[]/lat[] arrays.

get.description: Looks up administrative area information by geocode or postcode.
Searches for nearby points of interest.
Calculates a route between two points with step-by-step navigation instructions.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Route mode: t=fastest+avoid traffic, c=fastest, d=shortest, e=shortest+traffic.

get.description: Returns the coordinate array for a route line by path ID.
Calculates distance and time between multiple origin-destination pairs (max 25 each).
Snaps GPS coordinates to the nearest road.
Returns traffic speed data for roads near the specified location.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for predicted traffic data.

get.description: Returns the area reachable from a starting point within a given distance or time.

parameters.name: span
parameters.description: Distance or time limit (e.g., 5000m, 1800s). Max 30000m or 1800s.

post.description: Optimizes visit order for multiple locations (route planning).

otsp.description: Open loop (do not return to start).

get.description: Returns information about the given area polygon, such as building count.

building_count.description: Number of buildings in the area.
